helpful: statpack relist-count and per-Term cert tables gave a concrete anchor to adjust from
CourtListener docket search by party_name identified the underlying district-court case and the petitioner's pro se filing history in two calls
gaps: fedcourts query has no signal for petition type (extraordinary writ vs cert) — free-text relevance returned recent salient cert cases instead of mandamus-alike priors
statpack carries no extraordinary-writ/Rule 20 stratum, so the effectively-zero mandamus grant rate had to come from domain knowledge rather than corpus evidence
no filed-document text was provisioned (petition is a scanned PDF), so the questions presented were unreadable; harmless here but would matter on a closer case
statpack.md in this build lacks the 'Segment base rate by salience band' section the predict prompt points to
notes: Clear-cut cell: pro se Rule 20 mandamus petition, all respondents waived response, long-conference distribution, zero relists.
